arts.ttl: Declan Rice admits his anxiety levels are 'through the roof' while playing for Arsenal as he opens up on the pressure of needing to win every game in trophy bid
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta's side secured a tense victory against Leicester on Saturday after James Justin's double cancelled out goals from Gabriel Martinelli and Leandro Trossard.

arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest Reluctantly Ready to Sell PSG Summer Target If Big Offer Arrives
arts.sum: This past summer, Paris Saint-Germain was linked to Nottingham Forest defender Murillo as the Ligue 1 side looked to bolster their center-back position. PSG eventually signed Willian Pacho, who has hit the ground running for the capital club. Nonetheless, the central defense could still be improved, whether during the January window or next summer. Last […] The post Nottingham Forest Reluctantly Ready to Sell PSG Summer Target If Big Offer Arrives appeared first on PSG Talk.

arts.ttl: Declan Rice makes telling admission about 'anxious' Arsenal after rollercoaster week
arts.sum: After being accused of the 'Dark Arts' and conceding late at Manchester City to lose two points, the Gunners threw away a two-goal lead at home to Leicester - before prevailing with two injury-time goals of their own

arts.ttl: Chelsea supporters are fetching the world's smallest violin to serenade Man City fans as Cole Palmer continues to make mockery of £40m price tag... with star midfielder now compared to Arsenal legend
arts.sum: KIERAN GILL AT STAMFORD BRIDGE: There is some confusion over where you'll find the world's smallest violin. But that's what Chelsea fans have fetched to serenade Manchester City.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta barely celebrated Arsenal's last-gasp heroics against Leicester City. Has the Gunners boss finally learned to walk on the mild side, asks IAN HERBERT
arts.sum: IAN HERBERT AT THE EMIRATES STADIUM: There was a time when a vital goal like Arsenal's, in the death throes of a game, would have sent Mikel Arteta barrelling down the touchline.

arts.ttl: Arsenal: Declan Rice responds to 'cheating' claims as set-piece kings secure another win
arts.sum: The Gunners have picked up crucial points from set-pieces this season and last

arts.ttl: Liverpool, Man Utd Target Sets Impressive Bundesliga Record as PSG Future Remains Uncertain
arts.sum: Xavi Simons continues to show that the 2024-25 season was no fluke as various top European clubs follow his progress this campaign with RB Leipzig. This past summer transfer window, Simons and Paris Saint-Germain made a short-term decision to loan him out again to the Bundesliga side for a second straight campaign. Nonetheless, that’s not […] The post Liverpool, Man Utd Target Sets Impressive Bundesliga Record as PSG Future Remains Uncertain appeared first on PSG Talk.

arts.ttl: SPORTS AGENDA: Arsenal exec has form for snubbing Man City, Alexander Ceferin's salary fuels his commitment to UEFA... and EFL cyber attack claims another victim
arts.sum: MIKE KEEGAN: Tim Lewis's apparently-petulant storming out of the directors' box at the Etihad Stadium is not the first time he has raised eyebrows in Manchester with a hasty departure.

arts.ttl: Premier League boss tells Arsenal to sign his team's best player
arts.sum: Brentford boss Thomas Frank has admitted that he would sign Bryan Mbeumo if he were at a bigger club. The 25-year-old has arguably been Brentford's best player for the past two campaigns, starring for the London club in the absence of Ivan Toney last term.

arts.ttl: 'I swear': Arsenal star shocked after Jack Grealish says he runs with the ball like de Bruyne
